positioning: Obesity Killer Kit is a doctor-formulated Ayurvedic obesity and weight-loss system for overweight/obese adults.
Positioning boundary: a structured, guided protocol; not a loose supplement and not positioned as a standalone fat-burner product.
Core mechanism framing: appetite regulation + eating-behavior correction (true-hunger eating) + digestion support to make caloric-deficit adherence easier for weight loss/obesity reduction.
promise_claims: Core promise: lose 3 to 5 kg in 15 days when the protocol is followed.
Supports weight-loss efforts by reducing hunger/cravings, supporting satiety, and improving digestive comfort so adherence becomes easier.
Refund framing: if weight loss does not start within the first 7 days, refund can be requested when protocol adherence and daily tracker sharing conditions are met.
eligibility: Adults (18+) with BMI above 25 who want fast visible weight-loss support with a natural, practical adherence-focused routine.
Users with obesity-linked concerns (e.g., PCOD/PCOS, thyroid imbalance, BP, fatty liver, diabetes, IBS) can be relevant users, but without cure/treatment claims.
exclusions: Do not position for users below 18 years of age.
caution_conditions: Doctor-review required before use for people on multiple psychiatric medications.
Doctor-review required before use for people with multiple surgery history.
protocol_morning: Take OK Liquid first thing on waking, on an empty stomach.
After OK Liquid, maintain a 4-hour no-solid-food window.
Zero-calorie drinks are allowed during the 4-hour no-solid window.
Routine behavior: eat only on true hunger; no fixed meal timings; many users shift to 1 to 1.5 meals/day.
protocol_night: Take OK Tablet + 1/2 tsp OK Powder around 15 minutes before sleep with warm water.
fasting_rules: After OK Liquid, keep a 4-hour no-solid-food window.
Zero-calorie drinks are allowed in the 4-hour no-solid window.
allowed_items: Up to 30g complex carbs (millets or oats) only if still hungry.
Milk in tea/coffee is allowed (as the exception to dairy restriction).
Water and other zero-calorie drinks (during the 4-hour no-solid window).
mechanism_allowed_claims: Protocol-based appetite regulation + eating-behavior correction + digestion support for obesity/weight-loss support.
OK Liquid supports fullness/satiety and helps reduce hunger and cravings, supporting true-hunger eating.
OK Tablet + OK Powder support digestive/gut comfort (bloating, acidity, gas, heaviness) to support daily compliance.
Helps users stay in a caloric deficit more consistently by reducing unnecessary intake, making weight-loss progress more achievable over time.
mechanism_disallowed_claims: Rapid fat melting / burns fat rapidly by itself.
Zero-effort results / melts fat without effort / overrides all discipline.
Works even with unlimited junk food outcomes.
safety_public_line: Public trust line: no side effects.
No synthetic ingredients and no chemical preservatives.
safety_internal_handling: Internal handling: first 3 days can be an adjustment period.
guarantee: If weight loss does not start within the first 7 days, full refund can be requested when BOTH are true: protocol was followed and daily tracker was shared.
continuation: Continue in cycles until target weight or BMI 25.
After each 30 days, keep a 7 to 10 day break.
maintenance: Maintenance is not lifelong dependency on the kit.
Maintain caloric balance, follow a balanced diet, and stay active.
Positioning: stopping the kit does not itself cause automatic weight regain; maintenance habits matter.
proof_points: Creator: Dr. Arun Tyagi (BAMS, M.D. (Kaya Chikitsa); 34 years of experience).
Institution: Arogyam Ayurvedic Panchakarma Hospital and Research Centre (founded 2013, Jodhpur).
Tracker-led support (daily tracker shared on WhatsApp) and 7-day refund policy.
messaging_guardrails: No cure claims for medical conditions.
Do not make abstract ad copy that hides the obesity/weight-loss objective.
Do not position for users below 18.
Do not position as a standalone fat-burner.
on_image_copy_requirements: ON-IMAGE COPY MANDATE (NON-NEGOTIABLE): every headline and subheadline must explicitly mention weight loss, obesity reduction, or clear weight outcome language. Avoid abstract copy that hides the core product goal.

ON-IMAGE COPY MANDATE (NON-NEGOTIABLE): approved explicit phrases include weight loss support, obesity management support, lose weight, reduce excess weight, 3 to 5 kg in 15 days, appetite control for weight loss.
ON-IMAGE COPY MANDATE (NON-NEGOTIABLE): do not use vague transformational lines without naming weight loss or obesity context.
ON-IMAGE COPY MANDATE: mechanism messaging must explicitly connect to obesity/weight-loss goal, not abstract behavior language alone.

Every headline/subheadline that uses mechanism language must also name the goal directly (weight loss/obesity context); avoid abstract-only mechanism lines unless the same unit also clearly states weight loss or obesity context.

product_info: Obesity Killer Kit is a doctor-formulated Ayurvedic obesity and weight-loss system for overweight/obese adults.
Positioning boundary: a structured, guided protocol; not a loose supplement and not positioned as a standalone fat-burner product.
Core mechanism framing: appetite regulation + eating-behavior correction (true-hunger eating) + digestion support to make caloric-deficit adherence easier for weight loss/obesity reduction.
Core promise: lose 3 to 5 kg in 15 days when the protocol is followed.
Supports weight-loss efforts by reducing hunger/cravings, supporting satiety, and improving digestive comfort so adherence becomes easier.
Refund framing: if weight loss does not start within the first 7 days, refund can be requested when protocol adherence and daily tracker sharing conditions are met.

Adults (18+) with BMI above 25 who want fast visible weight-loss support with a natural, practical adherence-focused routine.
Users with obesity-linked concerns (e.g., PCOD/PCOS, thyroid imbalance, BP, fatty liver, diabetes, IBS) can be relevant users, but without cure/treatment claims.
Pregnant women.
Women within 6 months postpartum.
People actively taking insulin (insulin injections).
Do not position for users below 18 years of age.
Doctor-review required before use for people on multiple psychiatric medications.

After each 30 days, keep a 7 to 10 day break.
Maintenance is not lifelong dependency on the kit.

Positioning: stopping the kit does not itself cause automatic weight regain; maintenance habits matter.

200 video testimonials.
